message:
fix(safety): add overflow protection to PixelBuffer and HitGrid

Apply checked arithmetic for index calculations:
- PixelBuffer: Add pixel_index() helper, update get()/set()
- GrayscaleBuffer: Add pixel_index() helper, update get()/set()
- HitGrid: Add cell_index() helper, update register()/test()

This matches the pattern used in OptimizedBuffer (bd-1dig).

Closes bd-2ex6, bd-dwyf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
